     the Fermi energy is    -0.7960 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.56791565 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19798403 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.36993163 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -319694.11183251 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  161302.28920974 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6092.49824920 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  149721.79437207 Ry

     absolute magnetization    =   107.82 Bohr mag/cell
